basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 27 Specialist, Senior Resident and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Super Specialist, Specialist & Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website esic.gov.in. A total of 27 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Super Specialist, Specialist & Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation for SC, ST & OBC as per rules for Senior Resident.

qualification.education_qualification: MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in concerned Super specialty, Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned speciality, MBBS with TCMC registration
qualification.details: Super Specialist: MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in the concerned Super specialty. Recognized medical qualification as per Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. All post graduate qualifications must be registered with the Medical Council. For Senior Consultant: at least five years post super specialty qualification experience. Specialist: Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in concerned speciality after MBBS with TCMC registration. For Casualty/ICU: PG Degree or PG Diploma in Anesthesiology/General Medicine/Pulmonary Medicine/Emergency Medicine. Experience: 3 years (degree) or 5 years (diploma) for Junior; 5 years (degree) or 7 years (diploma) for Senior. Senior Resident: For Superspeciality: DM/DNB preferred over MD/DNB. For Speciality: Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma after MBBS with TCMC registration. For ICU/Casualty: specific PG qualifications or MBBS with experience. All qualifications registered with Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Super Specialist: Full Time: Entry level Rs. 2,00,000/- per month, Senior Level Rs. 2,40,000/- per month. Part Time: Entry level Rs. 1,00,000/- per month, Consultant (Sr. Level) Rs. 1,50,000/- per month. Additional charges as applicable. Specialist: Full Time: Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11 Junior), Rs. 1,60,752/- (Level 12 Senior). Part Time: Rs. 60,000/- per month. Additional charges as applicable. Senior Resident: Approximately Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11, PG Degree holders). Deductions for Diploma/MBBS only.

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in concerned Super specialty, Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma in concerned speciality, MBBS with TCMC registration

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ESIC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Super Specialist: MCh/DM/DNB or equivalent in the concerned Super specialty. Recognized medical qualification as per Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. All post graduate qualifications must be registered with the Medical Council. For Senior Consultant: at least five years post super specialty qualification experience. Specialist: Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in concerned speciality after MBBS with TCMC registration. For Casualty/ICU: PG Degree or PG Diploma in Anesthesiology/General Medicine/Pulmonary Medicine/Emergency Medicine. Experience: 3 years (degree) or 5 years (diploma) for Junior; 5 years (degree) or 7 years (diploma) for Senior. Senior Resident: For Superspeciality: DM/DNB preferred over MD/DNB. For Speciality: Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma after MBBS with TCMC registration. For ICU/Casualty: specific PG qualifications or MBBS with experience. All qualifications registered with Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation for SC, ST & OBC as per rules for Senior Resident.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Super Specialist: Full Time: Entry level Rs. 2,00,000/- per month, Senior Level Rs. 2,40,000/- per month. Part Time: Entry level Rs. 1,00,000/- per month, Consultant (Sr. Level) Rs. 1,50,000/- per month. Additional charges as applicable. Specialist: Full Time: Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11 Junior), Rs. 1,60,752/- (Level 12 Senior). Part Time: Rs. 60,000/- per month. Additional charges as applicable. Senior Resident: Approximately Rs. 1,38,108/- (Level 11, PG Degree holders). Deductions for Diploma/MBBS only.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 14th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 27 vacancies for the posts of Super Specialist, Specialist, and Senior Resident in its latest recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Specialist post, candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree/DNB or Diploma in the concerned specialty after MBBS with TCMC registration. Specific qualifications are required for Casualty/ICU roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced in this ESIC recruitment is 69 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 250/-. SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 50/-, while PwBD and Women candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Super Specialist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Super Specialist post varies based on experience and whether it's full-time or part-time. It ranges from Rs. 1,00,000/- to Rs. 2,40,000/- per month, with additional charges applicable.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Kollam, Kerala, at the ESIC facility. The exact address and reporting time are mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the ESIC Recruitment 2026 for these posts is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the ESIC website. A direct link to the notification is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job portals.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 14th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.
